en:
# Love Letter: Premium Edition Rules

## Overview

Love Letter Premium Edition is a complete edition for **2–8** suitors. With **2–4 players**, play the classic **16-card** game (Princess = **8**). With **5–8 players**, add **16 more cards** (32 total) for new intrigue, tokens mid-round, and shared number values.

> This is a **standalone** edition — you do not need the 2025 Full Game box. Rules below follow the AEG / Z-Man Premium rulebook.

## Components

- **32 game cards** (16 for 2–4 players; all 32 for 5–8)
- **8 player reference cards**
- **25 Tokens of Affection** (♥)
- **1 Jester token**
- Card sleeves & rulebook (as included in the box)

## Setup (2–4 Players)

Assemble this **16-card** deck (set the other 16 aside):

| Value | Card | Qty |
|:-----:|------|:---:|
| 8 | Princess | 1 |
| 7 | Countess | 1 |
| 6 | King | 1 |
| 5 | Prince | 2 |
| 4 | Handmaid | 2 |
| 3 | Baron | 2 |
| 2 | Priest | 2 |
| 1 | Guard | 5 |

1. Shuffle the 16 cards face down.
2. Remove the **top card** from the game face down (unseen).
3. **2 players only:** also set aside the next **3 cards face up** (unused this round, but visible).
4. Deal each player **1 card**.
5. Whoever was most recently on a date goes first (if tied, youngest wins the tie).

## How to Play

Played over several rounds (each round = one day).

### Your Turn

1. Draw the top card of the deck (you hold 2).
2. Discard **one** of them face up in front of you and **apply its effect** (even if bad for you).
3. Keep discards visible and overlapping in order.
4. Turn passes to the left.

### Out of the Round

Discard your remaining hand face up (**do not** apply its effect). Take no further turns this round. Effects tied to being knocked out (Constable, Jester) still apply.

### Choosing a Player

If an effect requires choosing a player who cannot be chosen (Handmaid / Sycophant), discard your card **without effect**.

## End of a Round

A round ends when:

1. The **deck is empty** after a turn — still-in players reveal. Highest hand value wins.  
   **Tie:** compare **sums of discarded card values**; highest wins.  
   **Still tied:** all tied players win the round.
2. **Only one player remains** — that player wins immediately.

Winner(s) each gain **1 Token of Affection**. Reshuffle and set up the next round; previous winner goes first (if multiple winners, whoever among them was most recently on a date).

## Winning (2–4 Players)

| Players | Tokens to win |
|:-------:|:-------------:|
| 2 | 7 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |

## Setup & Play (5–8 Players)

Use **all 32 cards**. Shuffle, remove **1 card** face down, deal 1 to each player. No face-up set-aside for 2-player (2-player uses the 16-card rules above).

**Important:** When a card says **“Name a number”**, that number matches **all cards with that value**. Example: naming **4** with a Guard hits both **Handmaid** and **Sycophant**.

### Winning (5–8 Players)

First to **4 Tokens of Affection** wins.

Tokens can be gained mid-round (Bishop, Constable, Jester, etc.), so a player can win **without** ever winning a round. If two or more players reach the target at the same time, they play **another round** as a tiebreaker.

## Classic Cards (2–4 & 5–8)

| Value | Card | Qty (2–4) | Effect |
|:-----:|------|:---------:|--------|
| 8 | **Princess** | 1 | Play/discard → out. Remaining effects of the card that discarded her do not apply (e.g. no Prince redraw). Knock-out effects (Constable, Jester) still apply. |
| 7 | **Countess** | 1 | No effect when discarded. **Must** discard if holding King or Prince. May discard voluntarily. Do not reveal the other card. |
| 6 | **King** | 1 | Trade hands with another player still in the round. |
| 5 | **Prince** | 2 | Choose any player still in (including you). They discard (no effect unless Princess) and redraw. Empty deck → draw the face-down set-aside. All others Handmaid → must choose yourself. |
| 4 | **Handmaid** | 2 | Immune until the **start** of your next turn. If all others are protected, the active player must choose themselves if possible. |
| 3 | **Baron** | 2 | Secretly compare with another player; **lower** is out. Tie → nothing. |
| 2 | **Priest** | 2 | Secretly look at another player's hand. |
| 1 | **Guard** | 5 | Choose a player and name a **number other than 1**. If they hold that number, they are out. |

## Expansion Cards (5–8 Only)

| Value | Card | Qty (in 32) | Effect |
|:-----:|------|:-----------:|--------|
| 9 | **Bishop** | 1 | Name a number and a player. If they hold it → gain **1 ♥** (win immediately if that reaches the target). That player may then discard (Princess still knocks out) and redraw. At **end-of-round compare**, Princess still beats Bishop; Bishop is 9 for all other effects. |
| 7 | **Dowager Queen** | 1 | Secretly compare; the player with the **higher** value is out. Tie → nothing. |
| 6 | **Constable** | 1 | No effect when discarded. If you are knocked out while this is in your **discard pile**, gain **1 ♥** (can win immediately). |
| 5 | **Count** | 2 | At round end, when comparing hands: each Count in your discard pile adds **+1** to your hand value (two Counts → +2). Can make a 7 beat the Princess. Resolve remaining ties via discard sums as usual. |
| 4 | **Sycophant** | 2 | Choose a player (including yourself). The **next** card that chooses one or more players must include that player. |
| 3 | **Baroness** | 2 | Look at **1 or 2** other players' hands privately. |
| 2 | **Cardinal** | 2 | Choose **exactly 2** players still in (may include yourself); they swap hands. Then you may peek at **one** of those hands. Fewer than 2 legal targets → no effect. |
| 1 | **Guard** (+3) | 8 total | Same Guard effect (name a number ≠ 1). Three extra Guards in the 32-card deck. |
| 0 | **Jester** | 1 | Choose another player (place the Jester token as a reminder). If they **win the round**, you also gain **1 ♥** (can win immediately). |
| 0 | **Assassin** | 1 | While in hand: if targeted by a Guard (any named number, even 0), reveal Assassin → the **Guard player** is out, you are not. Then discard Assassin and redraw (empty deck → set-aside card). |

## Notes vs Full Game (2025)

| | Premium | Full Game (site base) |
|--|---------|------------------------|
| Players | 2–8 | 2–6 |
| Princess | **8** | **9** |
| Extra roles | Bishop, Assassin, Jester, … | Spy, Chancellor |
| Guard guess | **Number** | Card name |
| Round-end tie | Discard sum → all tied win | All tied win (no discard sum) |
zh:
# 情书：珍藏版规则

## 概述

《情书：珍藏版》是支持 **2–8** 人的完整版本。**2–4 人**使用经典 **16 张牌**（公主 = **8**）；**5–8 人**再加入另外 **16 张**（共 32 张），引入新角色、中途得 ♥，以及**相同点数多牌**等机制。

> 本版可**独立游玩**，无需 2025 完整版。以下对齐 AEG / Z-Man Premium 官方说明书。

## 组件

- **游戏牌 32 张**（2–4 人用 16 张；5–8 人用全部 32 张）
- **玩家参考卡 8 张**
- **好感标记 25 枚**（♥）
- **小丑标记 1 枚**（Jester token）
- 牌套与说明书（盒内附带）

## 准备（2–4 人）

组成以下 **16 张**牌堆（其余 16 张放一旁不用）：

| 点数 | 卡牌 | 数量 |
|:----:|------|:----:|
| 8 | 公主 | 1 |
| 7 | 伯爵夫人 | 1 |
| 6 | 国王 | 1 |
| 5 | 王子 | 2 |
| 4 | 侍女 | 2 |
| 3 | 男爵 | 2 |
| 2 | 神父 | 2 |
| 1 | 守卫 | 5 |

1. 将这 16 张洗匀，面朝下。
2. 移出牌堆顶 **1 张**（不查看，面朝下）。
3. **仅双人局：** 再翻开接下来的 **3 张**面朝上放一旁（本轮不用，但所有人可见）。
4. 每人发 **1 张**手牌。
5. 最近约会过的玩家先手（并列则最年轻者先手）。

## 游戏流程

游戏进行多轮（每轮 = 一天）。

### 你的回合

1. 从牌堆顶抽 1 张（手中现有 2 张）。
2. 正面朝上弃掉其中 **1 张**并**结算效果**（即使对自己不利）。
3. 弃牌保持可见并按顺序叠放。
4. 轮到左手边下一位。

### 出局

将剩余手牌正面朝上弃掉（**不结算**效果）。本轮不再行动。与出局相关的效果（警官、小丑）仍结算。

### 指定玩家

若效果要求指定的目标因侍女 / 谄媚者而无法指定，则该牌**无效弃掉**。

## 一轮结束

本轮在以下情况结束：

1. 回合结束后**牌堆已空** — 仍在局者亮牌，手牌点数最高者胜。  
   **平局：** 比较各方**弃牌点数总和**，高者胜。  
   **仍平：** 所有并列者都赢下本轮。
2. **只剩一人在局** — 该玩家立即获胜。

胜者（们）各得 **1 枚**好感标记。重新洗牌准备下一轮；上轮胜者先手（多人并列则其中最近约会者先手）。

## 整局胜利（2–4 人）

| 人数 | 所需好感标记 |
|:----:|:------------:|
| 2 | 7 |
| 3 | 5 |
| 4 | 4 |

## 准备与流程（5–8 人）

使用**全部 32 张**。洗牌后移出 **1 张**面朝下，每人发 1 张。双人局仍按上文 16 张规则（含翻开 3 张）。

**重要：** 当牌要求**“说出一个点数”**时，该点数匹配**所有同点数牌**。例如守卫猜 **4**，会同时命中**侍女**与**谄媚者**。

### 整局胜利（5–8 人）

最先集齐 **4 枚**好感标记者获胜。

部分牌可在中途获得标记（主教、警官、小丑等），因此可以**从未赢过一轮**就获胜。若多人同时达到目标，再打**加赛一轮**决出最终胜者。

## 经典卡牌（2–4 与 5–8 共用）

| 点数 | 卡牌 | 数量(2–4) | 效果 |
|:----:|------|:---------:|------|
| 8 | **公主** | 1 | 打出/弃掉 → 出局。导致弃掉公主的牌之剩余效果不再结算（如王子不再重抽）。出局相关效果（警官、小丑）仍生效。 |
| 7 | **伯爵夫人** | 1 | 弃掉时无效果。持有国王或王子时**必须**弃她；也可自愿弃。不要展示另一张。 |
| 6 | **国王** | 1 | 与另一名仍在局玩家交换手牌。 |
| 5 | **王子** | 2 | 指定仍在局的任意玩家（含自己）。目标弃牌（除公主外不结算）并重抽。牌堆空则抽开局面朝下移出的牌。其余皆侍女 → 必须指定自己。 |
| 4 | **侍女** | 2 | 至你**下一回合开始**前免疫。若其余皆受保护，当前玩家须尽可能指定自己。 |
| 3 | **男爵** | 2 | 与另一玩家秘密比牌，**较低**者出局；相同则无事。 |
| 2 | **神父** | 2 | 秘密查看另一玩家手牌。 |
| 1 | **守卫** | 5 | 指定一名玩家，说出一个**非 1 的点数**。若对方持有该点数则出局。 |

## 扩展卡牌（仅 5–8 人）

| 点数 | 卡牌 | 数量(32张中) | 效果 |
|:----:|------|:------------:|------|
| 9 | **主教** | 1 | 指定一名玩家并猜其点数；猜中则得 **1 ♥**，对方可弃牌重抽（弃公主仍出局）。**亮牌比大小时仍负于公主**；其余效果视主教为 9。 |
| 7 | **太后** | 1 | 与指定未出局玩家秘密比点；点数**较高**者出局。相同则无人出局。 |
| 6 | **警官** | 1 | 弃牌区生效：若你出局且弃牌区有警官，获得 **1 ♥**（可立即获胜）。 |
| 5 | **伯爵** | 2 | 本轮结束需比手牌时，弃牌区每有 1 张伯爵，手牌点数 **+1**（两张可叠为 +2）。可使 7 点胜过公主。仍平则按弃牌总和裁定。 |
| 4 | **谄媚者** | 2 | 指定一名玩家（可含自己）。下一张需要指定玩家的牌，在合法的前提下必须包含该玩家。 |
| 3 | **女男爵** | 2 | 可查看 **1 名或 2 名**其他玩家的手牌，不向其余玩家公开。 |
| 2 | **红衣主教** | 2 | 指定恰好两名仍在局玩家（可含自己）交换手牌，然后你可偷看其中一人的手牌。合法目标不足 2 人 → 无效。 |
| 1 | **卫兵** | +3（共 8） | 同守卫：指定一名玩家并说出一个非 1 的点数；猜中则其出局。 |
| 0 | **小丑** | 1 | 指定另一名玩家（可用小丑标记提醒）。若该玩家赢得本轮，你获得 **1 ♥**（可立即获胜）。 |
| 0 | **刺客** | 1 | 手牌中生效：若有人以守卫/卫兵猜测你（无论所报点数），亮出刺客 → 猜测者出局；你弃掉刺客并重抽（牌堆空则抽开局移出的牌）。 |

## 与完整版（2025）对照

| | 珍藏版 | 完整版（站内本体） |
|--|--------|-------------------|
| 人数 | 2–8 | 2–6 |
| 公主 | **8** | **9** |
| 特有角色 | 主教、刺客、小丑等 | 间谍、大臣 |
| 守卫猜测 | **点数** | 牌名 |
| 亮牌平局 | 弃牌总和 → 仍平则皆胜 | 并列者皆胜（无比弃牌） |
